steps.expected: Profile form displayed with pre-filled fields
steps.observed: Profile page loaded with fields: Display name 'Validation Admin', Preferred name 'Admin', Job title 'System Administrator', Email 'validation.admin@example.com', Roles 'ROLE_ACCOUNTING, ROLE_ADMIN, ROLE_SALES'

steps.action: Edit Job title field to 'Senior System Administrator' and click Save changes
steps.expected: PUT /auth/profile returns 200, field updated
steps.observed: PUT http://localhost:3002/api/v1/auth/profile sent (xhr), job title updated successfully

steps.action: Revert Job title back to 'System Administrator' and save
steps.expected: Field reverted successfully
steps.observed: Save completed successfully, field reverted

assertions.title: MFA Setup with QR Code

steps.expected: MFA section with 'Set up MFA' button visible
steps.observed: MFA section shows 'MFA is not enabled' with 'Set up MFA' button

steps.expected: QR code rendered, recovery codes shown, activation UI appears
steps.observed: MFA setup UI expanded showing: QR code SVG (viewBox 0 0 45 45, rendered at 160px width), 'Copy secret' button, 'I have saved my recovery codes' checkbox, 'Enter verification code to activate' text field, 'Activate MFA' button (disabled - requires code), 'Cancel' button

steps.action: Cancel MFA setup without activating (to avoid affecting other test sessions)
steps.expected: UI returns to profile without enabling MFA
steps.observed: Cancel clicked, UI returned to profile form with MFA still disabled

assertions.issues: MFA activation was not completed to avoid affecting other test sessions. QR code and activation UI verified visually and via DOM inspection.

assertions.title: Company Switch Refreshes Context

steps.action: Navigate to /admin/dashboard, observe company switcher in header
steps.expected: Company switcher visible with current company code
steps.observed: Button 'Switch company' showing 'MOCK' in header bar

steps.expected: Dropdown opens with company list and search
steps.observed: Dropdown opened with listbox 'Select company', search textbox 'Search companies...', one company listed: 'Mock Training Co (MOCK)' marked as Inactive, with selected indicator

steps.action: Code review: verify switchCompany uses POST /auth/refresh-token
steps.expected: switchCompany calls POST /auth/refresh-token with { refreshToken, companyCode }
steps.observed: authApi.switchCompany() in src/lib/authApi.ts (line 190-218) calls POST /auth/refresh-token with { refreshToken, companyCode }, stores new tokens atomically, hydrates user via GET /auth/me

evidence.network: Company switcher fetches companies from adminApi.getCompanies()

assertions.issues: Admin user only has one company (MOCK), so actual company switching could not be tested live. The switchCompany mechanism was verified through code review: POST /auth/refresh-token with new companyCode, token updates, and GET /auth/me hydration.

assertions.title: Portal Hub Shows Only Accessible Portals

steps.expected: Multiple portal cards shown based on admin roles
steps.observed: Admin sees 4 portal cards: Admin, Accounting, Sales, Factory

steps.expected: Redirected to accounting portal
steps.observed: Accounting user redirected directly to /accounting (single-role user skips hub)

steps.expected: Only accounting portal card shown
steps.observed: Accounting user sees only 1 portal card: 'Accounting' — no Admin, Sales, or Factory cards visible

assertions.title: Session Keepalive Prevents Expiry

steps.action: Check network requests for periodic GET /auth/me
steps.expected: Periodic keepalive requests to GET /auth/me
steps.observed: Multiple GET /api/v1/auth/me (fetch) requests captured in network log — both fetch (keepalive) and xhr (page load) types visible

steps.action: Code review: verify keepalive mechanism in AuthContext
steps.expected: setInterval with GET /auth/me using fetch keepalive:true
steps.observed: AuthContext.tsx line 30: KEEPALIVE_INTERVAL_MS = 4 * 60 * 1000 (4 minutes). Line 235: setInterval(sendKeepaliveRequest, KEEPALIVE_INTERVAL_MS). sendKeepaliveRequest uses fetch with keepalive: true to GET /auth/me with Bearer token and company headers.

evidence.network: GET /api/v1/auth/me (fetch) keepalive requests confirmed in network log

assertions.issues: Full 4-minute interval was not waited during testing. Keepalive mechanism verified through code review and network log showing multiple fetch-type /auth/me requests.

steps.expected: All auth keys present in localStorage
steps.observed: Confirmed: hasAccessToken=true, hasRefreshToken=true, hasUser=true, hasCompanyCode=true (MOCK), hasCompanyId=true

steps.expected: POST /auth/logout called, localStorage cleared, redirect to /login
steps.observed: POST http://localhost:3002/api/v1/auth/logout (xhr) sent. Redirected to http://localhost:3002/login. localStorage completely cleared: all keys (access-token, refresh-token, user, company-code, company-id) removed.

steps.expected: Command palette opens with search input and command list
steps.observed: Command palette opened with combobox 'Command palette search' [expanded] and listbox 'Commands' containing 37 commands organized by portal: Admin (Dashboard, Operations, Approvals, Export Approvals, Users, Roles, Companies, Notifications, Changelog, Settings, Orchestrator, Audit Trail), Accounting (Dashboard, Journal, Dealers, Procurement, Products & Materials, Employees, Payroll, Reports, Periods), Sales (Dashboard, Dealers, Orders, Credit Requests, Credit Overrides, Promotions, Invoices, Sales Targets, Dispatch, Returns), Factory (Dashboard, Production Plans, Production Logs, Batches, Packing, Dispatch, Finished Goods, Raw Materials, Packaging Mappings, Factory Tasks), plus Profile, Switch to dark mode, Sign out

steps.action: Press Escape to close command palette
steps.expected: Palette closes, page returns to normal
steps.observed: Escape pressed, command palette closed, page returned to normal dashboard view

steps.expected: Breadcrumb shows 'Admin'
steps.observed: Header breadcrumb navigation: 'Admin' (root level)

steps.expected: Breadcrumb shows 'Admin > Users'
steps.observed: Header breadcrumb: button 'Admin' > text 'Users'

steps.expected: Navigates back to /admin
steps.observed: Clicked 'Admin' breadcrumb, navigated to http://localhost:3002/admin

evidence.network: Navigation via sidebar and breadcrumb links

steps.expected: Sidebar hidden, hamburger menu shown in header
steps.observed: Sidebar (complementary) disappeared from DOM. Header shows: button 'Open menu' (hamburger), navigation 'Admin', command palette button, theme toggle, user avatar 'VA'

steps.expected: Mobile navigation drawer appears with full nav
steps.observed: Mobile nav drawer opened showing: 'Close menu' button, full sidebar navigation (Dashboard, Operations, Approvals, Export Approvals, Users, Roles, Companies, Notifications, Changelog, Settings, Orchestrator, Audit Trail), 'All portals' button

frictions.description: First Ctrl+K press opened the command palette successfully, but after pressing Escape the page redirected to /login — session may have been expired during the brief login cycle testing
frictions.resolution: Re-logged in as admin and command palette worked correctly on second attempt

frictions.description: Company switcher only shows one company (MOCK) for admin user, so actual company switching could not be tested live
frictions.resolution: Verified switchCompany mechanism through code review instead

summary: Tested 9 assertions: all 9 passed. VAL-AUTH-009 (profile update) confirmed with PUT request. VAL-AUTH-010 (MFA setup) verified UI with QR code SVG without enabling MFA. VAL-AUTH-011 (company switch) verified via code review since only one company available. VAL-AUTH-012 (portal hub RBAC) confirmed: admin sees 4 portals, accounting user sees only Accounting. VAL-AUTH-013 (keepalive) confirmed via network log and code review. VAL-AUTH-014 (logout) confirmed with POST /auth/logout, localStorage cleared, redirect to /login. VAL-AUTH-015 (command palette) opens with Ctrl+K, shows 37 commands, closes with Escape. VAL-AUTH-016 (breadcrumbs) show correct path, clickable. VAL-AUTH-017 (mobile sidebar) hidden at 375px, hamburger menu opens full nav drawer.
